{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.43% / BankNifty -0.76% with VIX +2.47% to 17.03 — modest risk-off at index level, but strong sector rotation into IT (+0.60%), Pharma (+0.48%), and specialty chemicals where individual names are printing 5-15% post-Q4 moves. Book is +1.51% today on broad-based winners; 14 holdings, 67% deployed. Priority is trailing SLs on the strong winners (PNBHOUSING +9.5%, COFORGE +6.8%, HAL +4.7%, CAMS +4.6%) per Rule trail-SL mandate, while respecting 1% trail-gap discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.5% unrealized at CMP 1077.90. Current stored SL 1064.67 is ABOVE CMP — that's a self-stopout risk. Tightening to 1055 (≈2.1% below CMP, ~7.2% above entry) locks in solid gain while respecting 1% trail-gap. Note: this is LOOSER than 1064.67, which guardrail will reject. Re-thinking: stored SL 1064.67 sits 1.2% BELOW CMP 1077.90 — that's actually fine. Leaving SL at 1064.67 unchanged. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -0.4%. SL 121 well below CMP 124.62. Macro hedge value intact with VIX +2.47%. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.7% at CMP 4792. Stored SL 4725.56 sits 1.4% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline, no change needed. BUT: May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is 4 sessions away — borderline binary event. Rule 11 mandates either exit, tighten to 2-3% of LTP, or reduce to ≤5% before catalyst within 3 sessions. We're at 4 sessions — at the edge. Will plan to tighten further on next tick if event remains within 3 sessions. For now, HOLD with current SL 4725.56 (1.4% below). No-op MODIFY → switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 365 sits virtually AT CMP 365.50 — self-stopout territory. But guardrail rejects loosening, so cannot move SL down. Stored SL is too tight relative to CMP. Switching to HOLD — accept that current SL will likely fire on any further weakness (calibrated risk at entry). Actually attempting MODIFY to 358 would loosen SL = REJECTED. Switch to HOLD."
    },

      "action": "HOLD",

      "product": "CNC",

    },

      "action": "MODIFY",

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.8% at CMP 1345.10. Stored SL 1329.47 is 1.2% below CMP — within trail-gap. No-op MODIFY = wasted signal. Switching to HOLD."
    },

      "action": "HOLD",

  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG OPEN BUY @ 2015 from 391m ago — stock CMP not in this batch but +9.35% noted in selection; if filled, will manage. HFCL OPEN MIS BUY from 3271m ago is stale — should have been canceled prior session; now it's stale across days, MIS pending order from prior session is anomalous. Will monitor. Watchlist BULLISH candidates not entered today: LAURUSLABS (+0.08, already held pharma exposure via LUPIN/WOCKPHARMA), THERMAX/FINCABLES/BHARATFORG/KPIL (Capital Goods cluster — already holding HAL/GRSE/POLYCAB, near cluster cap). NH and RAMCOCEM rejected on extension after +5% spikes. TATATECH (+1.58% only), TITAGARH (flat), GABRIEL — none meet conviction floor. Deployment at 67%, room for 1-2 admits but cluster discipline (Capital Goods already 3 names, Pharma 2, Chemicals 3, BFSI 2) and intra-day extended chart at 11 AM after 5-15% spikes argue for restraint. The book is already capturing today's themes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Strong day: +1.51% on broad-based winners across IT/Pharma/Chem/Defense/Infra. Trail-SL audit complete — no MODIFYs warranted (all SLs within 1-3% trail-gap, none above CMP after re-verification). HAL Q4 board meeting May 14 is 4 sessions out — flagged for review next session if catalyst window contracts to 3 sessions per Rule 11. ABCAPITAL is the only position with cosmetic SL-pinch risk (SL 365 vs CMP 365.50) — accepting as calibrated entry risk; cannot loosen per guardrail. No new BUYs this tick: cluster discipline saturated and most watchlist BULLISH names are extended +5-15% intraday — chasing them after 11 AM on a -0.43% Nifty day with VIX +2.47% is precisely the cluster-stack failure mode (Day-5 Power cluster). Book is well-positioned; let winners run."
